verses.text: Mi genthei a khualte thupha ngah ahi hi. Topa in haksatna hunah amaute honkhia ding hi
Topa in amaute hu-in hingsak ding a, leitungah amaute thupha ngah mi kici ding hi. Amau' galte' khutsungah amaute pialo ding hi
A ci uh a nat ciangin Topa in amaute kem ding a, a cinatna khempeuh uh damsakkik ding hi
Ke'n ahih leh, “ Topa aw, kei hong hehpih in la, kei hong damsak in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang tungah kong khialzo hi,” ka ci hi
Ka galte in elna tawh keima thu gen uh a, “Cik ciangin amah a si tam, cik ciangin a min a mang tam,” ci uh hi
Keimah a en dingin mi hong pai ciangin, kam mawkna a pau uh hi. A lungsim uhah siatna kaikhawm uh a, a paikhiat uh ciangin a genthang uh hi
Kei hong mudah khempeuh in keima thu kihuauhuau uh a, kei-a' dingin a sia thei pen ding a geelgeel uh hi
Amaute in, “Amah nak gim mahmah hi. A lupna panin thokikzo nawnlo ding hi,” ci uh hi
Ka muan', ka lawm itpa, keima an a nepa nangawn in a khetul tawh kei hong peek vial hi
Ahih hangin, Topa aw, amaute na thukkik theihna dingin kei hong hehpih in la, hong damsak in
Ka galte in keimah hong zolo ding a, keima tungah nong lungkimna ka thei ding hi
Keima hoihna hangin na hong huh ding a, nangma omna-ah nong omsak tawntung ding hi
Israel Pasian, Topa in khang tawntungin thupha ngah ta hen. Amen, Amen!
